Perfect! I have now read all the source files from the ContosoUniversity application. Here's a summary of all the files with their complete contents:

## **ContosoUniversity Application - Complete Source Files**

### **Controllers**

#### 1. BaseController.cs
- Abstract base controller for all controllers
- Manages SchoolContext and NotificationService
- Provides SendEntityNotification methods for tracking entity operations

#### 2. CoursesController.cs
- Handles CRUD operations for courses
- Manages file uploads for teaching material images (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, bmp)
- Validates image files (max 5MB)
- Sends notifications for CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE operations

#### 3. DepartmentsController.cs
- Manages departments with instructor assignments
- Implements concurrency control with RowVersion
- Handles conflict resolution when multiple users edit concurrently
- Sends entity notifications

#### 4. HomeController.cs
- Index, About, Contact, Error, and Unauthorized actions
- About page groups students by enrollment date

#### 5. InstructorsController.cs
- Complex instructor management with course assignments
- Manages office assignments (one-to-one relationship)
- Course assignment/deassignment functionality
- Supports async operations for model binding

#### 6. NotificationsController.cs
- Retrieves pending notifications (max 10 at a time)
- Supports marking notifications as read
- Returns JSON responses for AJAX calls

#### 7. StudentsController.cs
- Full CRUD operations for students
- Implements sorting and pagination (10 items per page)
- Search functionality by name
- Validation for enrollment dates (1753-9999 range)
- Error handling and logging

### **Models**

#### 8. Course.cs
- CourseID (int, manually assigned)
- Title (string, 3-50 chars)
- Credits (0-5)
- DepartmentID (foreign key)
- TeachingMaterialImagePath (optional, max 255 chars)
- Relationships: Department, Enrollments, CourseAssignments

#### 9. CourseAssignment.cs
- InstructorID, CourseID (composite primary key)
- Links instructors to courses (many-to-many)

#### 10. Department.cs
- DepartmentID, Name, Budget (decimal/money), StartDate
- InstructorID (administrator)
- RowVersion (for concurrency control)
- Relationships: Administrator (Instructor), Courses

#### 11. Enrollment.cs
- EnrollmentID, CourseID, StudentID
- Grade (enum: A, B, C, D, F)
- Relationships: Course, Student

#### 12. ErrorViewModel.cs
- Simple error model with RequestId

#### 13. Instructor.cs
- Extends Person class
- HireDate (required, datetime2, 1753-9999 range)
- Relationships: CourseAssignments, OfficeAssignment

#### 14. Notification.cs
- Id, EntityType, EntityId, Operation (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE)
- Message, CreatedAt, CreatedBy, IsRead, ReadAt
- EntityOperation enum

#### 15. OfficeAssignment.cs
- InstructorID (primary key, one-to-one)
- Location (string, max 50 chars)

#### 16. Person.cs
- Abstract base class for Student and Instructor
- ID, LastName, FirstMidName (both required, max 50 chars)
- FullName property (computed)

#### 17. Student.cs
- Extends Person class
- EnrollmentDate (required, datetime2, 1753-9999 range)
- Relationships: Enrollments

### **SchoolViewModels (Subdirectory)**

#### 18. AssignedCourseData.cs
- CourseID, Title, Assigned (bool)

#### 19. EnrollmentDateGroup.cs
- EnrollmentDate, StudentCount
- For grouping students by enrollment date

#### 20. InstructorIndexData.cs
- Instructors, Courses, Enrollments (all enumerable)
- Used for complex instructor index view

### **Data Layer**

#### 21. DbInitializer.cs
- Seeds database with sample data
- 8 students, 5 instructors, 4 departments, 7 courses
- Office assignments and course assignments
- 11 enrollment records with grades

#### 22. SchoolContext.cs
- DbSet for: Course, Enrollment, Department, OfficeAssignment, CourseAssignment, Person, Student, Instructor, Notification
- OnModelCreating: Configures all DateTime properties to datetime2, sets up inheritance (TPH), composite keys, relationships

#### 23. SchoolContextFactory.cs
- Creates SchoolContext with SQL Server configuration
- Enables retry on failure (5 retries, 30-second delay)

### **Services**

#### 24. NotificationService.cs
- In-memory ConcurrentQueue<Notification> (max 500 items)
- SendNotification: Enqueues notifications with auto-generated messages
- ReceiveNotification: Dequeues notifications (used by NotificationsController)
- MarkAsRead: No-op for in-memory implementation
- Generates operation-specific messages (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE)

---

**Key Architecture Notes:**
- Table-per-Hierarchy (TPH) inheritance for Person→Student/Instructor
- Composite key for CourseAssignment
- One-to-one relationship: Instructor↔OfficeAssignment
- All DateTime properties mapped to datetime2
- Concurrency control on Department via RowVersion
- In-memory notification queue (not persisted)
- File upload validation and storage in Uploads/TeachingMaterials
